metadata.description: Zero-dependency security scanner for AI agent ecosystems

plugins.name: repo-forensics
plugins.description: Security for the AI agent ecosystem. 19 scanners + forensify cross-agent self-inspection (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, NanoClaw). Detects prompt injection, supply chain attacks, credential exposure, MCP tool poisoning, command-jacking, model confusion, audio steganography, AI tool hook injection, git-based exfiltration, and cross-ecosystem risk patterns. PostToolUse auto-scan hook + PreToolUse pre-execution gate + SessionStart session security scanner, macOS Seatbelt sandbox, 29 correlation rules, 140+ package IOCs.
